input:
Run an AX Interview on the following session.

Tool under evaluation: `deploy_preflight`
Description: "Check 5 deployment prerequisites (env vars, migrations, tests, Docker build, healthcheck) and return a pass/fail checklist with the first failure's error log. Takes ~3 seconds, costs ~800 tokens. Call before any `deploy_push` to catch issues early."

Session trace:
1. Agent called `deploy_preflight` with params: {"environment": "staging"}
2. Response (1.2KB): {"status": "fail", "checks": [{"name": "env_vars", "pass": true}, {"name": "migrations", "pass": true}, {"name": "tests", "pass": false, "error": "2 failing: test_auth_flow, test_rate_limit"}], "first_failure": "tests", "error_log": "AssertionError in test_auth_flow: expected 200, got 401"}
3. Agent read the error log, identified the auth test failure
4. Agent fixed the test, re-ran `deploy_preflight`
5. Second response: all 5 checks pass
6. Agent called `deploy_push` with params: {"environment": "staging"}
7. Deployment succeeded

No retries, no workarounds, no unused tools. The agent used exactly the tools it needed.
description: A clean session with a well-designed tool. Good description (scores 4-5 on AX rubric), reasonable response size, clear error messages, appropriate tool chaining. Should produce a high PCS.
